subject: fix(themes): restore red accent for Sunset dark variant
body:
The original Sunset theme had a red accent (#dc2626) contrasting against
the orange primary. When light/dark variants were added, the dark accent
was changed to #fb923c (orange), making both primary and accent orange —
a monotone look that lost the original orange-red sunset tension.

Restored #dc2626 as the dark accent to bring back the contrast.

Tags: themes, ui, color
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
